basic_details.job_title: NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has released the official Lead Consultant Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026 on a contractual basis. Eligible candidates up to 55 years of age with an MBBS/ BDS and an MD, Ph.D., MPH, MBA (Health Management/ Health Administration), or a Post Graduate Diploma in Hospital and Health Management, along with more than 10 years of experience in Public Health, Community Health, or Health Systems, can apply online on or before 04 August 2026. The official not

qualification.education_qualification: Medical Graduate (MBBS/ BDS) with MD/ PhD/ MPH/ MBA (Health Management/ Health Administration)/ Post Graduate Diploma in Hospital and Health Management, Over 10 years experience in Public Health/ Community Health and Health Systems
qualification.details: Medical Graduate (MBBS/ BDS) with MD/ PhD/ MPH/ MBA (Health Management/ Health Administration)/Post Graduate Diploma in Hospital and Health Management with over 10 years of experience in Public Health/ Community Health and Health Systems after post-graduation.

selection_process: Written Test (minimum qualifying mark 70% if conducted) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHSRC Lead Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NHSRC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NHSRC Lead Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Graduate (MBBS/ BDS) with MD/ PhD/ MPH/ MBA (Health Management/ Health Administration)/Post Graduate Diploma in Hospital and Health Management with over 10 years of experience in Public Health/ Community Health and Health Systems after post-graduation.

NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHSRC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHSRC Lead Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHSRC Lead Consultant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Lead Consultant post at NHSRC is 04 August 2026. Ensure all details are submitted correctly before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lead Consultant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Medical Graduates (MBBS/BDS) with a relevant post-graduation (MD/PhD/MPH/MBA/PG Diploma in Hospital and Health Management) and over 10 years of experience in Public Health/Community Health and Health Systems.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Lead Consultant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Lead Consultant position is 55 years. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation details.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Lead Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Lead Consultant position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 1,30,000/- to Rs. 1,70,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Lead Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Lead Consultant position in the National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the NHSRC Lead Consultant recruitment must be submitted online through the official NHSRC website.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NHSRC Lead Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Lead Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Lead Consultant post typically involves a Written Test, if conducted, and an Interview. A minimum qualifying mark of 70% is required for the written test.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the Lead Consultant position at the National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided for further information.
